description: §15.14 clean neg — a component reference resolved (same-file definition, successfully expanded by CE) SHALL NOT fire E-COMPONENT-035.
rationale: §15.14.2: 'Same-file declarations are resolved by CE before VP-2 runs and so SHALL NOT trigger E-COMPONENT-035.' `Known` is defined and successfully expanded, so no `isComponent === true` node survives to the post-CE walk.
